$comment: Pairs of SPL strings that MUST NOT collapse to the same canonical form. The fingerprint test asserts every pair hashes to two distinct values.

pairs.name: different-index
pairs.description: Different index values are not equivalent.

pairs.name: different-sourcetype
pairs.description: Different sourcetype values are not equivalent.

pairs.name: different-stats-function
pairs.description: stats count vs stats values returns different aggregates.

pairs.name: different-by-clause
pairs.description: BY host vs BY user breaks aggregation grouping.

pairs.name: different-comparison
pairs.description: = vs > is a different filter even if the field is the same.

pairs.name: different-pipeline-order
pairs.description: stats|where is not the same as where|stats.
pairs.a: index=foo | stats count BY host | where count>10
pairs.b: index=foo | where count>10 | stats count BY host

pairs.name: extra-stage-not-debug
pairs.description: Adding a meaningful stage (eval) cannot be dropped.
pairs.b: index=foo | stats count BY host | eval ratio=count/total

pairs.name: explicit-head-with-meaningful-where
pairs.description: head 100 only drops when it's a trailing tweak, not when followed by a meaningful command.
pairs.b: index=foo | stats count BY host | head 100 | eval flag=1

pairs.name: different-source
pairs.description: Different source paths are not equivalent.

pairs.name: stats-vs-tstats
pairs.description: Different commands (stats vs tstats) produce different semantic queries.

pairs.name: additional-filter
pairs.description: An extra kv filter narrows results and must hash differently.

pairs.name: different-rename
pairs.description: Rename target field names are part of the search semantics.
